description: The 'Ndrina Paparo is a 'ndrina (clan) of the 'Ndrangheta, a Calabrian mafia organization, based in Isola Capo Rizzuto, Italy. It is allied with the Nicoscia, Arena, and Barbaro clans and has a branch in the Milan area. The clan has been involved in mafia association, extortion, arms trafficking, and public works corruption, including the high-speed railway line between Milan and Venice. In 2009, a major operation led to multiple arrests and seizures of assets worth €10 million.
